title: simulator.py: numpy/pandas battery charge/discharge simulation loop
acceptance_criteria: Resamples raw statistics timeseries to consistent frequency using resample+ffill/interpolate with capped limit
Simulation loop computes per-timestep charge/discharge state given consumption/production series and BatteryModel
Supports configurable battery size sweep (best_size determination)
Uses numpy/pandas vectorized operations where feasible, documented if loop-based
Pure functions where possible; fully type-hinted; ruff + mypy clean
completion_summary: Added resample_energy_series, simulate_battery (sequential SOC loop, vectorized surrounding math), simulate_battery_sizes sweep, BatterySimulationResult dataclass.
